_comment: 《凰谋》E01 花轿睁眼。12拍精炼版:5段kling动态(b01/b02/b05/b08/b11,关原声)+图文交替(无连续>2图文),前6.5s双动态暴击(掀盖头骤睁眼+活死人新郎)。旁白vi/角色对白+内心zh。关键帧全 nano-banana-pro/edit 喂定妆图(refVariant选端庄/现代)。多维度留人:每拍画面+动作+情绪三维设计。预算~$2.69<$3。pinyin已按zh补。

shots.content: Extreme close-up on a stunningly beautiful young Chinese bride's face the instant a red bridal veil is torn away — her eyes snapping wide open in raw terror and disorientation, pupils shrinking, lips parted in a sharp gasp, a sheen of sweat on her brow, tall red dragon-and-phoenix wedding candles flaring around her in a dim opulent bridal chamber.

video.motion: The red veil is violently ripped away; her eyes snap wide open in terror and confusion, pupils contracting; she gasps and jolts upright; the candle flames flare and sway around her.

captions.zh: 她死了，却活在别人身上
captions.pinyin: tā sǐ le , què huó zài bié rén shēn shàng
captions.local: Nàng đã chết, lại sống trong thân xác người khác

shots.content: Over-the-shoulder from the bride's point of view: on the red wedding bed beside her lies a gaunt, deathly-pale young man in red bridegroom robes with sunken cheeks, looking like a living corpse; her trembling pale hand recoils in the foreground; dim red candlelight, eerie and oppressive.

video.motion: Her trembling hand slowly recoils; the camera drifts to reveal the gaunt corpse-like groom lying still beside her; dread rises.

captions.zh: 她的新郎，是个将死之人
captions.pinyin: tā de xīn láng , shì gè jiāng sǐ zhī rén
captions.local: Tân lang của nàng, là một kẻ sắp chết

shots.content: Close-up of the beautiful young bride's own trembling hands held up before her face, gold-embroidered red bridal sleeves, staring at them in disbelief as if they are not her own, dim warm candlelight, single face in frame.

captions.pinyin: zhè bú shì wǒ de shǒu
captions.local: Đây không phải bàn tay của tôi

shots.content: A split-second frozen memory: a modern present-day female forensic pathologist in a white lab coat inside an evidence storage room, engulfed in a sudden fireball explosion, flame and flying debris lighting her determined face — a violent modern death.

captions.pinyin: wǒ míng míng yǐ jīng sǐ le
captions.local: Rõ ràng tôi đã chết rồi

shots.content: A dim ornate bronze vanity mirror in a red-candlelit bridal chamber reflecting the shocked, disbelieving face of the beautiful young bride, warm flickering candlelight, cinematic.

video.motion: The camera pushes slowly toward the bronze mirror as her reflection turns to meet her own eyes with dawning horror; candlelight flickers.

captions.pinyin: jìng lǐ de rén , gēn běn bú shì wǒ
captions.local: Người trong gương, chẳng phải là tôi

shots.content: A tall, coldly handsome young man in dark luxurious prince's robes stands at the edge of the red wedding bed, pale-faced with a feigned frail sickly air, looking down with a detached cold gaze; in the blurred foreground the bride is seen from behind over her shoulder; dim red candlelight; his is the only face in frame.

captions.zh: 本王的新王妃，倒是清醒
captions.pinyin: běn wáng de xīn wáng fēi , dào shì qīng xǐng
captions.local: Vương phi mới của bổn vương, tỉnh táo thật

shots.content: A sly old stewardess matron in dark hanfu holds out a dark medicinal bowl toward the viewer, a false smile that does not reach her cold eyes, dim bridal chamber, the bride's hand just entering the frame; over-the-shoulder, only the matron's face visible.

captions.pinyin: wáng fēi , hē le tā , ān shén
captions.local: Vương phi, uống đi cho an thần

video.motion: The bride's fingertip dips toward the dark medicine bowl and lifts to her nose; she sniffs; her pupils contract sharply as she catches a wrong scent; her calm mask hides a jolt of alarm.

captions.pinyin: zhè yào …… bú shì ān shén
captions.local: Thuốc này… không phải an thần

shots.content: The beautiful young bride leans over the gaunt pale 'dying' groom as if tucking the quilt, while her sharp intelligent eyes secretly study his face, complexion and steady breathing — cold analytical focus beneath a gentle pose, dim red candlelight, her face the only one in clear focus.

captions.pinyin: tā gēn běn méi bìng , tā zài zhuāng
captions.local: Chàng vốn không bệnh, chàng giả vờ

captions.zh: 满室的人，都在等他咽气
captions.pinyin: mǎn shì de rén , dōu zài děng tā yàn qì
captions.local: Cả phòng, đều đang chờ chàng tắt thở

video.motion: In the darkness the 'dying' groom's eyes suddenly snap open, fixing her with a cold, sharp, fully-alert stare — all sickliness gone in an instant; a candle flares.

captions.pinyin: nǐ bú pà wǒ , wèi shén me
captions.local: Cô không sợ ta, vì sao

captions.pinyin: zhè yí cì , lún dào wǒ zhí dāo
captions.local: Lần này, đến lượt tôi cầm dao
